summary: Iteration 10 testing complete. All fixes verified: 1) Chat preset buttons now show SVG arrows instead of 'chat_bubble' text, 2) LLM responses are structured with bold, bullets, numbered lists and end with proactive follow-up questions, 3) Welcome messages updated in DE/EN/NL, 4) Booking flow in chat works correctly (asks for name, email, suggests date). All form labels correct. Admin panel working.
passed_tests: Chat preset buttons show SVG arrows (no 'chat_bubble' text visible) ✓

Chat LLM responses are structured with bold, bullets, numbered lists ✓
Chat LLM response ends with a proactive follow-up question ✓
Chat welcome message DE: 'Guten Tag! Ich bin der NeXifyAI Advisor...' ✓
Chat welcome message EN: 'Welcome to NeXifyAI. I'm your AI advisor...' ✓
Chat welcome message NL: 'Welkom bij NeXifyAI. Ik ben uw AI-adviseur...' ✓
Chat booking flow works (asks for Vorname, Nachname, E-Mail) ✓
Contact form labels EN: FIRST NAME/LAST NAME/PHONE ✓
Admin login works with correct credentials ✓
All landing page sections render (Hero, Solutions, Use Cases, App Dev, Process, Integrations, Governance, Pricing, FAQ, Contact, Footer) ✓

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 verified all chat-related fixes: SVG arrows in presets (no chat_bubble text), structured LLM responses with bold/bullets/questions, updated welcome messages in all 3 languages, booking flow in chat. All form labels correct (VORNAME/NACHNAME/TELEFON in DE, FIRST NAME/LAST NAME/PHONE in EN). Admin panel working. Cookie banner must be dismissed first when testing.

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are live - Chat uses GPT-4o-mini via Emergent LLM key, Email via Resend
